overview: Anurag University, Hyderabad, emerged from Anurag Group of Institutions and the former CVSR College of Engineering and became a private state university in 2020 under Telangana Act 13 of 2020. For the former AGI/CVSR engineering stream, the university continues to run existing engineering programs and seats from the Venkatapur, Ghatkesar campus through state entrance-based admissions.
accreditation: Private State University under the Telangana State Private Universities framework; former AGI/CVSR engineering programs continue under state-counseling and TAFRC fee norms.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech - Artificial Intelligence, CSE, IT, Civil, EEE, ECE, Mechanical
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Rs. 1,35,000/year for existing AGI programs under TAFRC

admissions.admissionProcess: The official admissions policy states that existing AGI programs and seats continue to admit through state common entrance tests such as TG EAPCET, TG PGECET/GATE, and TG ICET. New university-only programs may additionally use ANURAGCET or other approved tests, but the former engineering stream remains under state-counseling norms.
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET, TG PGECET, and TG ICET schedules are announced by Telangana authorities each cycle; university-specific admissions and scholarship notices are published on Anurag University portals.

campus.specialNote: The university's existing engineering seats preserve the legacy of the former CVSR and AGI counseling stream even after conversion to university status.

contact.address: Venkatapur, Ghatkesar, Medchal-Malkajgiri District, Hyderabad - 500088, Telangana, India
